text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As curfew approaches, I spy Air Shakur outside
her dorm chatting with some friends.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Fancy bumping into you at this hour, Shakur.
Have you been off somewhere staring at your
computer again?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Somethin' like that. And what has her majesty
been up to?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm feeling a little peckish, so I ordered
some cup ramen for delivery.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ramen is great during the day, but wouldn't you
agree it's also fantastic at night?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
By the time night rolls around, I've been moving
around and using my head all day. I've burned
through all of my energy, so I'd say it probably
tastes better than during the day.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Is that right? In that case, would you care to join
me for some ramen right now?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Focusing on your computer all day counts as
using your head, right?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Nah. I can get all the nutrients I need from
supplements. Eating at this hour will only lead to
gaining unnecessary weight.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Awww... but eating is so important. I don't think
you ought to force yourself to suffer hunger
pangs. What do you think, Trainer?
choice_data_list:
Calorie control is also important, so
supplements are fine.

It's not good to ignore your hunger, so go
ahead and dig in!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You get it. That's clearly the most efficient path.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Come now... It's important to savor and enjoy
your meals too.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But I guess I shouldn't be surprised. You two are
totally in sync.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: We're what now? I've got no clue what you mean.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur takes the usual route of getting her
nutrients efficiently.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey! You can go ahead and keep your opinions
to yourself.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
See?! Even your trainer says it's fine. Let's have
some ramen! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: And you just happened to have ordered two, huh? Seems like you were planning to rope me in from the start.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Air Shakur gives in and joins Fine
Motion for some late-night cup ramen.
